analysis.rewritten_desc: Escape to this exclusive 8-bedroom home sleeping 18 guests just 10 minutes from Manchester's city centre. The fully equipped property features a private indoor hot tub, cocktail bar, and open-plan living spaces perfect for large groups or family reunions. Despite the £780/night rate, our home is rarely booked (33.7% occupancy) compared to similar properties in the area. Highlights include [amenity categories missing], making it a rare find for those seeking both luxury and capacity. With [property specifics], this retreat combines comfort with convenience. Guests praise the [key feature missing] in 4.9-star reviews from 52 guests. Please note parking arrangements and entertainment options are details we'd be happy to share upon request.
analysis.photo_order_rec: The cover photo should showcase the living area or hot tub to immediately communicate capacity and luxury, as high-occupancy listings in this market benefit most from showcasing communal spaces.
key_diagnosis: Price is £625.40 above market median (+405%) but occupancy is 14.1% below cohort median (33.7% vs 47.8%)
Title fails to include 'Manchester' in 25 characters, risking missed local SEO (12% more Manchester-based searches in cohort)
No lead photo shown despite median 17-photo listings in category
